title: helianthemum viscarium
intro: Helianthemum viscarium, also known as Rockrose or Sticky Rockrose, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Cistaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Helianthemum viscarium include wound healing, reduced inflammation, and antimicrobial activity, making it a useful remedy for skin conditions and minor injuries. Herbal preparations of Rockrose include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat various ailments, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
